sub_modules.conv2d_coord: Combinational row and column boundary control for line-buffer addressing and window-valid generation.
sub_modules.conv2d_window_pack: Combinational flattened stencil-window forwarding block used as an independent window assembly boundary.
sub_modules.conv2d_mac: Combinational matrix-vector dot product datapath with default 3x3 Gaussian coefficients.
sub_modules.conv2d_saturate: Combinational output-width limiter that clamps wide unsigned accumulated values to the output pixel width.
